title: achillea abrotanoides
intro: Achillea abrotanoides, also known as Achillea millefolium subsp. abrotanoides, is a perennial plant species within the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing menstrual cramps, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Achillea abrotanoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in skincare products due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties.
